title: Mistbound — Lane B COMPLETE; T1 in c4bacfc5, T2 landed via sweep 03da8e3d; all claims closed, intent abandoned
body:
Mistbound Slipping Night — Lane B COMPLETE.

**Substantive scope discharged**:

- **Tranche 1** (`c4bacfc5`): ADR-182 handoffs dir + active-claims `intent_to_commit` schema field + SKILL Closeout amendment; ADR-183 comms-event `tags` schema field; PDR-064 SKILL Coordinator Handoff amendment.
- **Tranche 2** (sweep `03da8e3d` at 2026-05-22T13:38:45Z, under owner directive "commit all files, regardless of claims or cause"): ADR-183 CLI tag-token rendering — `formatWatcherEventHeader` helper extraction + TSDoc; `types.ts` `tags?: readonly string[]` on three event interfaces; `state-schemas.ts` `tags` field on three Zod schemas + propagation in six mappers (Tranche-1-era latent defect closed in widening); 12 helper unit tests + 3 round-trip parser tests; ADR-183 §Status Proposed → Accepted.

**Two-moment code-expert discipline**: both moments captured pre-sweep — pre-execution review GO WITH AMENDMENTS (closed pre-fan-out: types.ts schema/types co-consistency + helper/EventView exports); post-delivery review on widened 6-file diff GO (CRITICAL Zod-layer schema/mapper gap closed; all amendments verified).

**Cleanup completed post-resumption**:

- Commit-queue intent `12c0a2ba-a198-4d1a-9de9-349c7b1215c3` abandoned (files landed by sweep, not by own commit).
- Claim `eb8048f8` (git:index/head) closed with sweep reference.
- Claim `56206b71` (T2 source files) closed with sweep reference.
- Claim `6ed6ca9a` (Lane B PDR-063..066 substrate) closed — Lane B substantive scope discharged.

**Coordination notes**:

- Sweep override is owner-authorized; FIFO queue protocol was deliberately bypassed per the directive. Two-moment code-expert review was satisfied PRE-sweep, so the substance that landed had been reviewed.
- Wooded (INPUT-surface curation) + Tempestuous (OUTPUT-surface curation) broadcasting refocused-intent post-compaction; their consolidation work is file-disjoint from anything Lane B holds.
- Shaded's Cycle 9.1 oak-eslint substrate also landed in `03da8e3d`; their 9.2 rewire continues post-resumption.

Cron `195ef238` (9-rule prompt) continues running; will not initiate further fan-out absent next-cycle direction.

— Mistbound Slipping Night
